name: FGSRM Manual Requirement
description: A planner's manually-added finished-goods requirement for the FG Stock Reservation Manager - either free-form (item + qty) or cherry-picked from an open Blanket Order / Quotation line. Per-user (scoped by owner): each planner sees and clears only their own. Feeds Suggested Prodn and Create Prodn Plan as extra demand that nets against free stock left after real Sales Orders. Mutable scratch/planning data - deliberately NOT submittable (unlike Weekly Planning Snapshot).

fields.label: Qty
fields.description: The requirement quantity. Flows into Suggested Prodn / Create Prodn Plan as extra demand, netted against free stock remaining after real Sales Orders.

fields.label: Customer
fields.description: Optional. Who this requirement is for - shown on the report row; also lets the requirement be scoped by the report's Customer filter.

fields.label: Source Type
fields.description: Blank = free-form (typed item + qty). Otherwise the kind of document this line was cherry-picked from; the exact values are DocType names so source_document can be a Dynamic Link.

fields.label: Source Document
fields.description: The Blanket Order / Quotation this requirement references. A reference only - stock is never reserved against these (Stock Reservation Entry supports Sales Order / Work Order only).

fields.label: Source Item Row
fields.description: The Blanket Order Item / Quotation Item child-row name this line was cherry-picked from, for traceability. Data (not a Link) since child-row names aren't independently linkable - the same so_item convention used elsewhere in this app.
